key_findings: 3-phase softmax (max, exp-sum, normalize), L1-fit vs streaming paths, CB persistence patterns, mask tiles, matmul-based sum reduction for precision
matmul path for SUM via MM, scaler=1.0, WaitAndPopPerTile streaming, tile-row work units, reduce helper available
REDUCE_COL for height reduction, chunked column processing, DEST_AUTO_LIMIT, prepare_reduce_scaler, column-major tile delivery

functions: reduce<SUM, REDUCE_ROW> with post_reduce_op(recip_tile) for sum-exp+reciprocal
reduce<MAX, REDUCE_COL> for height max finding
reduce<SUM, REDUCE_COL> with post_reduce_op(recip_tile) for height sum-exp+reciprocal
copy_tiles with exp post_op for computing exp(x-max)

rationale: Avoids L1 memory pressure. Read input 3 times from DRAM: once for max, once for exp-sum, once for normalize. Simpler CB layout, works for any tensor size.
Incremental build: pipeline first, then exp, then full dim=-1, then dim=-2. Each stage testable independently.
